sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n89189" key="prosepiqea/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προσεπι-θεάομαι</orth>, <sense id="n89189.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">observe, consider besides</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Longin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">30.1</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
